cards.title: Compute, Storage, and Network Layers
cards.governance_note: Review compute capacity, state location, network paths, and managed-service dependencies.

cards.title: IAM, Observability, and Deployment Reproducibility
cards.governance_note: Review least privilege, logs, metrics, traces, infrastructure-as-code, rollback, and artifact versions.

cards.title: Cost, Resilience, and Dependency Mapping
cards.governance_note: Audit unit cost, autoscaling, backup restoration, regional dependency, failover, and vendor-dependency risks.
